basic_info.title: Xenoblade Chronicles X
basic_info.review: Xenoblade Chronicles X is a unique sci-fi JRPG praised for its massive open world exploration, innovative Skell mecha combat system, and single-player MMO-like experience on the planet Mira.

similar_games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild

play_today.details: The definitive version with enhanced visuals, improved character models, smoother performance, quality-of-life improvements including shared XP and quest tracking, plus new epilogue content. Best played on docked mode for optimal visuals.

recommended_patches.name: Cut Content Restoration Mod
recommended_patches.description: Restores dozens of unused missions, weapons, arts, and Skells that were cut from the original release. Version 1.0 is the latest stable release.

recommended_patches.name: Alternate Button Prompts
recommended_patches.description: Support for Dualshock 4, Dualsense, and Xbox One controller button prompts instead of default Switch buttons.

optimal_settings: Enable VSync for stable frame rate

play_today.details: The original release with classic presentation. Requires physical disc or emulator to play. Lacks Definitive Edition improvements.

optimal_settings: Internal resolution: 2x or higher for HD output

description.synopsis: In the year 2054, Earth has been destroyed by an intergalactic war between two alien races. A small number of survivors aboard the USS White Whale crash land on the mysterious planet Mira, where they must rebuild humanity while exploring a vast untamed world and battling hostile alien creatures.
key_features: Massive open-world exploration with single-player MMO-like experience
Innovative Skell mecha combat system for traversal and battle
Character customization including appearance, voice, and gender
Extensive side quests and survey missions across diverse biomes
Online co-op multiplayer support for certain activities
description.long_description: Xenoblade Chronicles X, developed by Monolith Soft and published by Nintendo, was originally released on Wii U in Japan (April 29, 2015) and later internationally (December 2015). It is the fourth main installment in the Xenoblade Chronicles series and a spiritual successor to the original game. Set in the year 2054 after Earth's destruction by an intergalactic war between alien races called the Gaur and Vahnatai, players control one of four customizable protagonists who crash land on the mysterious planet Mira aboard the USS White Whale. The game features a massive open world with single-player MMO-like elements, innovative Skell mecha combat for both traversal and battle, extensive character customization including appearance, voice, and gender selection, and over 100 hours of content through main story missions and side quests. The Definitive Edition (March 20, 2025) brings the game to Nintendo Switch with enhanced visuals, improved character models, smoother performance, quality-of-life improvements including shared XP and quest tracking, plus new epilogue content.
legacy_and_impact: Considered one of the most ambitious open-world JRPGs ever created
Pioneered single-player MMO-like experience in console RPGs
Established Skell mecha system as unique gameplay mechanic
Definitive Edition achieved 87 Metacritic score, among highest-rated Switch games of 2025
Demonstrated Nintendo's commitment to bringing Wii U exclusives to modern platforms
